title: Single-cell spatial explorer: easy exploration of spatial and multimodal transcriptomics.
author: Pont F Cerapio JP Gravelle P Ligat L Valle C Sarot E Perrier M Lopez F Laurent C Fournie JJ Tosolini M
content:
S-EPMC9881287 PMC9881287 Single-cell spatial explorer: easy exploration of spatial and multimodal transcriptomics.

Background

The development of single-cell technologies yields large datasets of information as diverse and multimodal as transcriptomes, immunophenotypes, and spatial position
